title: Cryptool platform launches after two years of development
content_html:
After two years of development, the Cryptool platform is live.

Sign-up is open at cryptool.io. New users can create an account, explore the platform and start onboarding friends and family through the referral programme.

The first release is the foundation. More modules ship over the next weeks and months, starting with the first Private Round investment opportunity and the public open of the Raise module.

To everyone who supported the project to this point: this is your milestone too.
author: Cryptool
